title: Idiom Library Expansion
objective: Formalize at least 8 additional film idioms beyond the initial 6 as state machines with entry conditions, state transitions, exit conditions, and variant rules. Create an idiom decision tree.
storyQuestions: What idioms does Mirror Visitor ch1 require that are not yet formalized (Confession, Phone Call, Memory Intrusion, Internal Monologue)?
Can every custom idiom be decomposed into a variant of an existing one or genuinely needs a new FSM?
What is the minimum set of idioms needed to cover 90% of thriller scenes?
How should compound idioms (one nested inside another) be represented?
baseAcceptanceChecks: At least 14 total idiom FSMs documented (6 existing + 8 new)
Each new idiom has entry condition, state diagram, variant list, exit condition, counter-example
An idiom decision tree exists for selecting the right idiom
